docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,528.00 FILED BY HILL, VANDOR AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, REGINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED SEP-19-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, REGINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, VANDOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, REGINA $1,528.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,578.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE: FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, VANDOR AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, REGINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2016 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO OCT-28-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF VANDOR HILL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT REGINA SHAW. PERSONAL SERVICE WAS EFFFECTUATED ON DEFENDANT REGINA SHAW ON 9/19/16, LESS THAN THE REQUISITE FIFTEEN DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.
